description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run test suite that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has multiple jobs: lint, docs, tests, fuzzing, and their success checks. The tests job runs a matrix of tests across different Python versions, optimization modes, and EVM versions. The lint job checks code style with Black, flake8, isort, and mypy. The docs job builds documentation with Sphinx. The fuzzing job runs fuzzing tests in parallel across 120 groups.
